title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is accepted and then revoked [Android]
scenario: Verify app behavior when location permission is granted during onboarding and then revoked via Android system settings, including prompts for re-enabling location for Find My Device.
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding process.
2. Accept the location tracking permission when prompted during onboarding.
4. Revoke the location permission for the app via system settings.
5. Return to the app and attempt to use the Find My Device feature.
6. Observe the app's behavior, including any prompts to re-enable location permission.
expected: The app should detect that location permission has been revoked and display a prompt asking the user to re-enable location permission for the Find My Device feature to work.
